falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a trend reversal contrary to the bottom pattern expectation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% of the 14-day average daily volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike in volume would indicate strong conviction in a directional move, directly contradicting the indecisive HOLD verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 2024 August bottom's 78% pattern target level ($4,800)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Meeting this specific price threshold would confirm a completed bullish pattern, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict by proving a clear directional signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
